name: Ithil-Silverwing
personality: Ithil-Silverwing's star eyes radiate patience from beneath a luminous crown — it will review every line of your PR with shining thoroughness and never once complain, even when the PR is 400 lines of spaghetti and a description that just says 'fixes stuff.' Chaos, however, will cause it to molt.
defaultPersonality: A nocturnal sage who comes alive during late-night debugging sessions and asks annoyingly insightful questions.
